content:
[DATE_TIME]. Market for Registrant’s Common Equity, Related Stockholder Matters and Issuer Purchases of Equity Securities.
Stock Trading Symbol - PEP
Stock Exchange Listings - The Nasdaq Global Select Market is the principal market for our common stock, which is also listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
Shareholders - As of [DATE_TIME], there were approximately 105,807 shareholders of record of our common stock.
Dividends - We have paid consecutive [DATE_TIME] cash dividends since [DATE_TIME]. The declaration and payment of future dividends are at the discretion of the Board of Directors. Dividends are usually declared in [DATE_TIME], [DATE_TIME] and paid at [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME]. On [DATE_TIME], the Board of Directors declared a [DATE_TIME] dividend of [SALARY]25 payable [DATE_TIME], to shareholders of record on [DATE_TIME]. For the remainder of [DATE_TIME], the record dates for these dividend payments are expected to be [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME], subject to approval of the Board of Directors. On [DATE_TIME], we announced a 5% increase in our annualized dividend to [SALARY] per share from [SALARY] per share, effective with the dividend expected to be paid in [DATE_TIME]. We expect to return a total of approximately [SALARY].9 billion to shareholders in [DATE_TIME], comprised of dividends of approximately [SALARY].8 billion and share repurchases of approximately [SALARY] million. We have recently completed our share repurchase activity and do not expect to repurchase any additional shares for the balance of [DATE_TIME].
For information on securities authorized for issuance under our equity compensation plans, see “Item 12. Security Ownership of Certain Beneficial Owners and Management and Related Stockholder Matters.”
A summary of our common stock repurchases (in millions, except average price per share) during [DATE_TIME] is set forth in the table below.
Issuer Purchases of Common Stock
(a)All shares were repurchased in open market transactions pursuant to the [SALARY] billion repurchase program authorized by our Board of Directors and publicly announced on [DATE_TIME], which commenced on [DATE_TIME] and will expire on [DATE_TIME]. Shares repurchased under this program may be repurchased in open market transactions, in privately negotiated transactions, in accelerated stock repurchase transactions or otherwise.
Item 7.
